name: K's Holdings Corporation
summary: K's Holdings Corporation, together with its subsidiaries, operates consumer electronics stores in Japan. It sells home appliances and related products. The company is also involved in the provision of incidental work and repair services. As of March 31, 2020, it operated through a network of 504 stores. The company was formerly known as Gigas K's Denki Corporation and changed its name to K's Holdings Corporation in February 2007. K's Holdings Corporation was founded in 1947 and is headquartered in Mito City, Japan.
